topStories.title: Former US defence chief says more war won’t bring peace to Middle East
topStories.description: Leon Panetta, former US Secretary of Defence, says that there is no clear end to the war in Iran.

topStories.title: Punjab: Veteran Congress leader Lal Singh passes away
topStories.description: He complained of breathing difficulties earlier this afternoon at his Chandigarh residence. He was rushed to the hospital in Mohali, where he breathed his last.

topStories.title: MEA denies Elon Musk joined Modi-Trump call regarding West Asia war, refutes New York Times report
topStories.description: India's MEA confirmed that Prime Minister Modi and US President Trump had a private call, refuting claims of Elon Musk's participation. They discussed the West Asia conflict and the importance of the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Protests in Yemen against US-Israeli attacks as Houthis warn of action
topStories.description: Protesters in Yemen took to the streets to voice support for Iran, Palestine, and Lebanon amid US and Israeli attacks.

topStories.title: How the US and Israel are making the Islamic republic stronger
topStories.description: The war is feeding into a theological narrative of martyrdom and sacrifice that is helping maintain the Islamic Republic

topStories.title: Russian strikes on Ukraine kill 4 as deal to end war dims
topStories.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio voices openness to diverting weapons to Kyiv to support the US attack on Iran.

topStories.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly poll: DMK allots Minister Mano Thangaraj’s seat to Congress
topStories.description: The DMK announced seats for allies on Saturday

topStories.title: The war on Iran faces a MAGA backlash
topStories.description: A deep split in the MAGA movement threatens Trump’s Iran war.

topStories.title: Indian government refutes report of Elon Musk joining Modi-Trump phone call
topStories.description: The government clarifies Elon Musk did not join the phone call between PM Modi and US President Trump on West Asia tensions.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Kuwait International Airport hit by drone attacks, radar system severely damaged
topStories.description: Kuwait International Airport faced multiple drone attacks on Saturday, which damaged its radar system. No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Denzel Washington: ‘Goals on the road to achievement cannot be achieved without…’
dailyNews.description: This quote from Denzel Washington is a straightforward yet profound declaration about the true ingredients of success.

dailyNews.title: Call between PM Modi and Donald Trump only: India on reports of Elon Musk joining phone conversation
dailyNews.description: Elon Musk joined the phone call between Prime Minister Modi and US President Donald Trump that took place on Tuesday over West Asia conflict.

dailyNews.title: 'Epstein Island' replaces White House name on Android, Google blames fake Maps edit
dailyNews.description: A technical glitch caused the White House switchboard number to appear as 'Epstein Island' on some Android devices. Google confirmed the glitch and said it was due to a fake edit on Google Maps.

dailyNews.title: ‘Suspend flights in high-risk conflict zones’ in West Asia': Pilots' body writes to DGCA, seeks war risk insurance cover
dailyNews.description: Iran-US war: The pilot's association mentioned in its letter to the DGCA that “the current belligerents, USA, Israel and Iran have shot down civilian airlines in the fog of war of previous conflicts.”

dailyNews.title: Puducherry Congress leader AV Subramanian resigns from all party positions ahead of assembly polls
dailyNews.description: Subramanian cited ‘private reasons and unavoidable circumstances’ as reasons for the decision in a letter to V Vaithilingam, Puducherry Congress chief.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods released on bail hours after arrest on suspicion of DUI
dailyNews.description: US golfer arrested in relation to rollover crash in Florida that did not ⁠cause any significant injuries.

dailyNews.title: NASA races to build moon base as US challenges China in new space race
dailyNews.description: NASA races to build a $20 billion lunar base as China and Russia advance moon ambitions, with experts warning China holds the advantage in space.

dailyNews.title: Soros-backed group among liberal orgs pumping eye-popping cash into Virginia gerrymandering effort
dailyNews.description: Virginia's redistricting referendum is being fueled by a tidal wave of liberal cash, with Soros- and Bloomberg-linked groups helping drive nearly $33 million into the effort.

dailyNews.title: 'Project Hail Mary' wins rave reviews as anti-woke Hollywood blockbuster
dailyNews.description: "Project Hail Mary" was celebrated by critics and audiences after its opening weekend, with commentators saying Hollywood should note its clean, entertaining storytelling.

dailyNews.title: Most Americans are doing one nightly activity that's wrecking their sleep, expert says
dailyNews.description: A sleep expert says 90% of Americans use phones in bed, as blue light exposure and stimulating content can disrupt rest. She shares a simple tip to set healthy boundaries.

dailyNews.title: SOUTH CAROLINA AG WILSON: Fentanyl is a national security threat — follow the Chinese money
dailyNews.description: South Carolina AG Alan Wilson says apps like WeChat and its Chinese counterpart Weixin enable fentanyl money laundering, calling the crisis a national security threat.

dailyNews.title: Scouting America moves to shed ‘woke’ label with major recommitment to military, traditional American values
dailyNews.description: Scouting America is pushing back on 'woke' claims, waiving fees for military families and replacing a DEI merit badge with a military-focused one.

dailyNews.title: Spanish government's Jimmy Gracey autopsy claims stump forensic expert: 'problem for me'
dailyNews.description: A forensic scientist says claims that Jimmy Gracey sustained bruises over hours are "implausible," raising doubts about Spain's accidental death ruling.

topStories.title: Cruz warns ‘radical Democrats’ will ‘burn it down’ if they win back Congress
topStories.description: Sen. Ted Cruz claims Democrats will impeach Trump repeatedly if they win the House in midterms, warning of halted legislation and endless investigations.

topStories.title: Wild Ultimatums and ‘Bombing Our Little Hearts Out’: A Portrait of Trump at War
topStories.description: President Trump has vacillated between boasting about U.S. military superiority and deep frustration that his war of choice is not always having the desired effects.

topStories.title: Castro Heirs Emerge Across Cuba’s Political Scene Amid Energy Crisis and Trump Threats
topStories.description: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”

topStories.title: Trump Offers More Aid to Farmers, a Key Support Bloc Hurt by Tariffs and War
topStories.description: The president announced new loan guarantees at a White House event that appeared intended to reassure a group that has found itself caught in the crosshairs of some of his major policies.

topStories.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Across U.S. Cities: What We Know
topStories.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

topStories.title: Is Iran a Political Problem for Trump? Tell Me How Long the War Lasts.
topStories.description: Historically, quagmire abroad and high prices at home are the ingredients of a failed presidency.

topStories.title: On CPAC’s Main Stage, Fissures in the Party Trump Remade
topStories.description: The Conservative Political Action Conference typically seeks to establish orthodoxy with its roster of speakers. This year, organizers created space for dissent, highlighting ongoing schisms in the MAGA movement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Does Anything He Wants — and More
dailyNews.description: When you’re a wannabe king they let you do it.

dailyNews.description: At this year's CPAC, many attendees toed a fine line between backing the war in Iran and worrying about how the conflict could expand.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages, Strait of Hormuz still blocked as Trump pushes for a deal
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is awaiting Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" guests for March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's guests include White House border czar Tom Homan, Democratic Rep. Jim Himes, and former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

dailyNews.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey

dailyNews.title: Iran claims Strait of Hormuz is closed as Trump says talks are underway
dailyNews.description: According to a statement from Iran's Revolutionary Guards, the Strait of Hormuz is closed, and they vowed a severe response to any ship trying to get through. That seemed to contradict President Trump's claim that Iran had allowed 10 ships through the Strait as a gift. Holly Williams has details.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Epstein victims sue Google and the Trump administration over alleged disclosure of personal information
dailyNews.description: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

dailyNews.title: Markets plunge and U.S. oil hits $100 as Trump's attempt to reassure Wall Street fails
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is used to bending financial markets to his will

dailyNews.title: Third round of ‘No Kings’ protests are expected to be the largest so far, organizers say
dailyNews.description: Millions are expected to gather across the country and around the world on Saturday for a third round of “No Kings” protests against President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
